query:
SELECT
                g.tool_name AS "key!",
                COUNT(*)::bigint AS "deny_count!"
            FROM governance_decisions g
            WHERE g.decision = 'deny'
              AND g.created_at >= $1 AND g.created_at < $2
              AND g.tool_name IS NOT NULL
              AND g.tool_name <> ''
            GROUP BY g.tool_name
            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
            LIMIT $3
